title: Improving language model behavior by training on a curated dataset
titleZh: 通过在精选数据集上进行培训来改善语言模型行为
summary: Our latest research finds we can improve language model behavior with respect to specific behavioral values by fine-tuning on a small, curated dataset.
summaryZh: 我们的最新研究发现，通过对小型精选数据集进行微调，我们可以改善特定行为价值观方面的语言模型行为。
highlights: Our latest research finds we can improve language model behavior with respect to specific behavioral values by fine-tuning on a small, curated dataset.
highlightsZh: 我们的最新研究发现，通过对小型精选数据集进行微调，我们可以改善特定行为价值观方面的语言模型行为。
